description.para: Offsets of registers from the start of the device

briefdescription.para: Enable PCAP send data to FPGA every 4 PCAP cycles.
This bit locks security config including: DAP_En, DBGEN,, NIDEN, SPNIEN.
AXI Write Address or Data or response timeout.
AXI Read Address or response timeout.
PCAP to DMA transfer length error.
Detect Positive edge of Init Signal.
Detect Negative edge of Init Signal.

memberdef.name: XDCFG_IXR_ERROR_FLAGS_MASK
memberdef.initializer: (XDCFG_IXR_AXI_WTO_MASK | \ XDCFG_IXR_AXI_WERR_MASK | \ XDCFG_IXR_AXI_RTO_MASK | \ XDCFG_IXR_AXI_RERR_MASK | \ XDCFG_IXR_RX_FIFO_OV_MASK | \ XDCFG_IXR_DMA_CMD_ERR_MASK |\ XDCFG_IXR_DMA_Q_OV_MASK | \ XDCFG_IXR_P2D_LEN_ERR_MASK |\ XDCFG_IXR_PCFG_HMAC_ERR_MASK)

sectiondef.header: DMA Source/Destination Transfer Length Register Bit definitions

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the device
is the register offset to be read

simplesect.para: C-style signature: u32 XDcfg_ReadReg(u32 BaseAddr, u32 RegOffset)

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the device
is the register offset to be written
is the 32-bit value to write to the register

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XDcfg_WriteReg(u32 BaseAddr, u32 RegOffset, u32 Data)

briefdescription.para: This function perform the reset sequence to the given devcfg interface by configuring the appropriate control bits in the devcfg specific registers the devcfg reset sequence involves the following steps Disable all the interrupts Clear the status Update relevant config registers with reset values Disable the loopback mode and pcap rate enable.

simplesect.para: This function will not modify the slcr registers that are relevant for devcfg controller
